caption: The video displays a split-screen view of a computer monitor showing a terminal window. The screen is divided into two identical side-by-side panels, each running a command-line interface with a dark background and light-colored text. The terminal is filled with logs of HTTP requests, including entries such as "GET /rapage/http1.0" and "GET /index.html HTTP/1.0". At the top of each panel, a directory path is visible, and a command prompt shows "1 docker-compose". The top right corner of the screen reveals a small portion of a user's profile picture and the date "Oct 28 0021". A status bar at the bottom of each terminal window contains text including "0-back?". Throughout the sequence, the image remains static, with no visible changes in the text, layout, or movement on the screen across the frames.
